economic_notes: Duncan First Nation Development Corporation is a wholly owned GBE with net income of $2,621,215 for 2023. Duncan's Carmon Creek Community Trust also accounted for by modified equity method. Carmon Creek Community Trust holds GICs earning 0.78% to 4.8%.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) asset retirement obligations not estimated or recorded as required under PS 3280; (2) long-term investments in Duncan First Nation Development Corporation were unaudited at time of release. Prior period restatement (Note 18) restated 2022 comparatives to consolidate Duncan First Nation Trust and recognize long-term investments in Development Corporation. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Duncan First Nation Development Corporation and Duncan's Carmon Creek Community Trust. One consolidated subsidiary: Duncan First Nation Agricultural Benefits Trust. Wages and benefits total of $1,940,756 includes $1,681,946 general wages plus $258,810 Chief and Council wages. total_government_transfers includes WCTC $7,999,098 + ISC Health $1,397,927 + First Nation Development Funds $348,724 + Government of Alberta $201,915 + CMHC $27,407 = $9,975,071 (resource revenue $99,954 treated as OSR). annual_debt_service reflects long-term debt repayment only; demand loan repayment of $214,929 excluded from this field.
